images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a 20‑year‑old Japanese idol‑style model with flawless, naturally textured skin, subtle pores and soft vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet alluring stare, straight black hair glistening with fresh‑wet droplets after a shower, styled in a form‑fitting black moisture‑wicking sports bra and high‑waist charcoal yoga pants that hug her slim waist, generous yet perky bust and toned thighs, the fabric catching a faint sheen. She stands in the centre of a sprawling pastel flower field, bathed in bright, golden god rays that stream through volumetric mist, the background softly blurred into dreamy bokeh of blossoms. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, global illumination, ray tracing for lifelike lighting, creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with desaturated muted tones, the model gazes directly into the camera with intense eyes, exuding quiet confidence.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese idol/influencer, early‑20s, flawless yet realistic skin with visible pores and fine vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive smile. She wears an elegant, form‑fitting ivory silk slip dress with delicate lace trim, thin straps slipping off one shoulder, the snug silhouette accentuating her slim waist and ample bust. The scene is set in a cozy vintage vinyl record store bathed in warm amber light and soft neon glow, blurred rows of records and a low‑key background creating depth.
